texto: This is the best thing to wear for today, you understand. Because I don't like women in skirts and the best thing is to wear pantyhose or some pants under a short skirt, I think. Then you have the pants under the skirt and then you can pull the stockings up over the pants underneath the skirt. And you can always take off the skirt and use it as a cape. So I think this is the best costume for today.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Edith Bouvier Beale: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “This is the best thing to wear for today, you understand. Because I don't like women in skirts an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, philosophy, skirt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
